sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before = last_transition.before_frame
    after = last_transition.after_frame
    ascii_before = before.ascii.split('\n')
    ascii_after = after.ascii.split('\n')
    print("=== Right panel comparison ===")
    for r in range(32, 51):
        b_seg = ascii_before[r][32:62]
        a_seg = ascii_after[r][32:62]
        if b_seg != a_seg:
            print(f"Row {r}: {b_seg} -> {a_seg}")
    print("\n=== All changes ===")
    for r in range(64):
        b_row = ascii_before[r]
        a_row = ascii_after[r]
        for c in range(min(len(b_row), len(a_row))):
            if b_row[c] != a_row[c]:
                print(f"Changed at ({r},{c}): '{b_row[c]}' -> '{a_row[c]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
